briefdescription.para: Boot header identification string.
Boot header Key source field.
SMAP bus width macros.
Defines for length of the headers.
IHT attributes.
IDCODE checks bypass.
Check [17:16] bits to bypass ID Code.
Prtn Attribute fields.
Prtn Attribute Values.
Number of entries possible in ATF: 2 cores * 3 (EL2 non-secure, EL1 secure and EL1 non-secure)
Errors during XilPdi processing.
Image Header Attributes.
Array size for image name.
Minimum buffer length for checksum.
Invert checksum.
Partition hash data Id.
Common address of storing partition hashes for both versal and versal_net.
Optional data attributes.
Maximum size of IHT Optional data for Data Id 3 is 2KB.

memberdef.name: XILPDI_PMCRAM_IHT_COPY_ADDR
memberdef.initializer: (0xF2004120U) /* IHT Optional data cannot exceed 16 KB */

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of Partition Owner field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of Checksum Type field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of Destination Cpu field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of EL field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of TrustZone field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of Partition Type field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of HIVEC field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function will return the value of Puf Header field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function checks if DpaCm is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This function checks if DpaCm is enabled or not in Metaheader.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Image Header Table

briefdescription.para: This function gets PUF header value from Image Header Table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Image Header Table

briefdescription.para: This function gets Delay Load value from Image Header Table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Image Header Table

briefdescription.para: This function gets Delay Handoff value from Image Header Table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Image Header Table

briefdescription.para: This function will return the Secondary boot device.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Image Header Table

briefdescription.para: This function checks if authentication is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to PDI Image Header Table

simplesect.para: TRUE if authentication is enabled and false otherwise

briefdescription.para: This function checks if encryption is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to PDI Image Header Table

simplesect.para: TRUE if encryption is enabled and false otherwise

briefdescription.para: This function returns the PLM encryption key source in Bootheader.
This function validates the Partition Header.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Partition Header

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful Partition Header validation.
XILPDI_ERR_ZERO_LENGTH if partition length is 0.
XILPDI_ERR_TOTAL_LENGTH if total length does not match encoded and unencoded word length.
XILPDI_ERR_PRTN_TYPE if partition type is other than elf, cdo, raw, raw_elf, cfi_gsc and cfi_gsc_unmask.
Verify that the partition length is not zero. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_ZERO_LENGTH error.
Verify the total partition length is not less than the encrypted data word and unencrypted data word length. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_TOTAL_LENGTH error.
Verify that the partition type is one of elf, cdo, raw raw_elf, cfi_gsc or cfi_gsc_unmask. If verification passes, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_PRTN_TYPE error.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the fields of the Image Header Table and validates them.

detaileddescription.para: Image Header Table contains the fields that are common across all the partitions and images.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the Image Header Table

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful Image Header Table validation.
XILPDI_ERR_IHT_CHECKSUM if checksum validation fails.
XILPDI_ERR_NO_OF_IMGS if number of images is less than 0 or more than 32.
XILPDI_ERR_NO_OF_PRTNS if number of partitions is less than 0 or more than 32.
Calculate the checksum of Image Header Table and compare it with the expected checksum in Image Header Table. If checksum does not match, return XILPDI_ERR_IHT_CHECKSUM error.
Verify the number of images is greater than zero and less than or equal to 32. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_NO_OF_IMAGES error.
Verify the number of partitions is greater than zero and less than or equal to 32. If verification passes, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_NO_OF_PRTNS error.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the boot header.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the address of Boot Header

listitem.para: Copy boot header to local variable from PRAM address

briefdescription.para: This function Reads the Image Header Table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header table

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful read.
Error code on unsuccessful copy of image header table.
Read the Image header table of 64 bytes and update the Image Header Table structure. Return error code if the reading is unsuccessful.
Copy image header table. If copy is successful, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return error code. Discard or ignore SMAP header when detected in partial PDIs.

briefdescription.para: This function verifies Image headers.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header table.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful image validation.
XILPDI_ERR_IH_CHECKSUM on checksum fail.
Verify checksum of all image Headers. If verification is passed, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_IH_CHECKSUM error.

briefdescription.para: This function verifies Partition Headers.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header table

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XILPDI_ERR_PH_CHECKSUM on checksum fail.
Verify checksum of all Partition Headers. If verification is passed, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_PH_CHECKSUM error.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Image Headers from the pdi stored in device (flash/SBI buffer/DDR/SD)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful read.
Error code on unsuccessful read.
Read the Image headers of 64 bytes and update the Image Header structure for all images. If reading is successful, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return error code.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Partition Headers from the pdi stored in device (flash/SBI buffer/DDR/SD)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful read.
Error code on unsuccessful read.
Read the Partition headers of 64 bytes and update the Image Header structure for all images. If reading is successful, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return error code.

briefdescription.para: This function reads IHT and optional data in Image Header Table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header table.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful read.
Error code on unsuccessful read.
Clear 2KB PMC RAM which is allocated to store IHT OPTIONAL DATA. If failed to clear, return XST_FAILURE error.
Read the IHT from Meta header. If reading fails, return XST_FAILURE error.
Read optional data. If reading is successful, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return error code.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to validate the word checksum for the Image Header table and Partition Headers.

para.verbatim: Checksum is based on the formula Checksum = ~ (X1 + X2 + X3 + .... + Xn)

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the data for which checksum should be calculated
of the buffer for which checksum should be calculated. Last word is taken as expected checksum.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS for successful checksum validation.
XST_FAILURE if checksum validation fails.
Verify the buffer is not empty and has at least 2 values. Otherwise, return XST_FAILURE
Calculate the checksum with the formula below Checksum = ~ (X1 + X2 + X3 + .... + Xn) where X1, X2, ...Xn are data words for which checksum should be calculated
Verify the calculated checksum with the last word (expected checksum) in buffer. If the checksum matches, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function returns address of hash entry for the given partition number.

parameterdescription.para: Number of partition for which hash entry is requested
Size of hash table

listitem.para: Address of hash entry for the given partition number (to skip authentication) if it present in the hash table.
NULL if hash entry is not present for the given partition number (to authenticate the signature as regular flow).
Search for the given partition num in hash table and return address of its entry if found. Otherwise, return NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function stores digest table for given data Id.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header table.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful read.
Error code on any failure while reading.

Validate optional data length. If length is less than 4 words, return XILPDI_ERR_NO_VALID_OPTIONAL_DATA error and if length is greater than 2048 bytes, return XILPDI_ERR_OVER_FLOW_OPTIONAL_DATA_AT_DATA_ID_3 error

Verify that the digest table size is multiples of 52bytes (since each entry in digest table consists of a partition number of size 4bytes and a hash of size 48bytes). Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_INVALID_DIGEST_TABLE_SIZE error.
Verify checksum of data structure info. If checksum does not match, return XILPDI_ERR_OPTIONAL_DATA_CHECKSUM_FAILED error.
Copy digest table to 0xF201D200U in PMC RAM. If copy fails, return error code. Otherwise, return XST_SUCCESS

briefdescription.para: This function searches for optional data address based on given Data ID.

parameterdescription.para: is start address of IHT optional data
is end address of IHT optional data
is to identify type of data in data structure

listitem.para: Address of desired optional data if given data ID is found
End address of IHT optional data if given data ID is not found.
Search for the data ID given and return optional data address if data ID is found. Otherwise, return end address of IHT optional data.

briefdescription.para: This function reads optional data in Image Header Table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Meta Header table.
is type of PDI for which optional data is being read

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful read.
Error code on unsuccessful copy.
Read the IHT Optional data from Meta header
Verify that the length of optional data is less than or equal to 15872 bytes. Otherwise, return XILPDI_ERR_OVER_FLOW_OPTIONAL_DATA error.
Copy optional data. If copy is successful, return XST_SUCCESS. Otherwise, return error code.

briefdescription.para: This is the header file which contains definitions for the PDI.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 kc 12/21/2017 Initial release 1.01 bsv 04/08/2019 Added support for secondary boot device parameters bsv 07/30/2019 Renamed XilPdi_ReadAndValidateImgHdrTbl to XilPdi_ReadImgHdrTbl rm 08/28/2019 Added APIs for retrieving delay load and delay handoff params 1.02 bsv 11/29/2019 Added support for smap bus width word in partial pdis vnsl 02/26/2020 Added support to read DPA CM Enable field in meta headers vnsl 03/01/2020 Added support to read PufHeader from Meta Headers and partition headers vnsl 04/12/2020 Added support to read BootHdr Auth Enable field in boot header 1.03 skd 07/14/2020 Function pointer DeviceCopy prototype changed 1.04 bsv 07/29/2020 Added UID, parent ID, function ID and copy to memory address kpt 07/30/2020 Added maximum limit for number of images td 08/19/2020 Fixed MISRA C violations Rule 10.3 bsv 10/13/2020 Code clean up kpt 10/19/2020 Added support to validate checksum of image headers and partition headers 1.05 td 11/23/2020 Coverity Warning Fixes ma 01/08/2021 Changed maximum number of entries possible for ATF har 02/01/2021 Added API to get PLM encryption key source bm 02/12/2021 Updated logic to use BootHdr directly from PMC RAM har 03/17/2021 Removed XilPdi_IsBhdrAuthEnable ma 03/24/2021 Redirect XilPdi prints to XilLoader ma 03/24/2021 Change ImgName to u8 to print max characters of PDI image names har 03/31/2021 Added PdiId in XilPdi_ImgHdrTbl structure 1.06 td 07/08/2021 Fix doxygen warnings bsv 08/16/2021 Code clean up bm 08/24/2021 Added Extract Metaheader support kpt 09/18/2021 Fixed SW-BP-REDUNDANCY in XilPdi_IsDpaCmEnable 1.07 kpt 02/01/2022 Updated XilPdi_ReadBootHdr prototype 1.08 bsv 07/06/2022 Added API to read OptionaData from Metaheader bm 07/06/2022 Refactor versal and versal_net code bsv 07/08/2022 Code changes related to Optional data in IHT bm 07/13/2022 Added compatibility check for In-Place PLM Update bm 09/13/2022 Reduce maximum number of partitions and images 1.09 har 11/17/2022 Removed macros for bh_auth attribute in Bootheader ng 11/23/2022 Added macros to replace magic numbers in XilPdi_ValidateChecksum kal 01/05/2023 Added PcrInfo attribute in XilPdi_ImgHdr sk 02/22/2023 Added Bit MASK for EoPDI SYNC logic dd 03/16/2023 Misra-C violation Rule 17.8 fixed sk 05/18/2023 Deprecate copy to memory feature am 07/03/2023 Added macros related to IHT OP data dd 08/11/2023 Updated doxygen comments kpt 12/04/2023 Move XilPdi_BootHdr to platform specific files am 03/02/2024 Added IsAuthOptimized variable in XilPdi_MetaHdr structure 1.11 kpt 11/05/2024 Add XilPdi_ReadOptionalData to read optional data pre 12/09/2024 use PMC RAM for Metaheader instead of PPU1 RAM 1.12 prt 06/04/2025 Fixed Misra-C R8.13 and R15.7 Violations sd 11/10/2025 Added support for VERSAL_2VP_P devices. 1.13 pre 04/17/2026 Added APIs to get EL and TZ attributes from partition header
